mapper.select: SELECT config_value FROM sram_config WHERE config_key = #{key}
SELECT updated_at FROM sram_config WHERE config_key = #{key}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sram_config (config_key, config_value, updated_at) VALUES (#{key}, #{value}, now()) ON CONFLICT (config_key) DO UPDATE SET config_value = EXCLUDED.config_value, updated_at = now()
